Tung Tung Tung Sahur is doing one half of the Bombaye dance trend to Copines by Aya Nakamura, with the dance performed by @temiandanais. Triple T brings the chaotic brainrot energy while leaving space for you to jump in, match the rhythm, and complete the other half of the viral dance. What makes this work is the duet energy. Copines already has that smooth, catchy Aya Nakamura sound, and the Bombaye dance trend gives it a fun, replayable movement that feels perfect for TikTok. Seeing Tung Tung Tung Sahur do one side makes the whole template even funnier, turning a viral dance into a brainrot partner moment you can actually join. Use this CapCut template for green screen dance duets, reaction memes, two-person dance remakes, or any post where you want to dance with Tung Tung Tung Sahur. It works especially well for Bombaye dance videos, Copines by Aya Nakamura edits, @temiandanais dance remakes, Triple T partner dances, and TikTok FYP clips where you complete the other half of the trend. CapCut template featuring @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur dancing to Dancing In The Dark by Rihanna while performing @71cent’s trending dance, turning a smooth, emotional track into a chaotic brainrot performance. Tung Tung Tung Sahur is a viral 2025 TikTok character—an AI-generated wooden figure that spread rapidly across the internet through remixes, dances, and surreal edits, becoming a staple of “brainrot” meme culture That’s what makes this edit hit—the contrast is perfect. You’ve got a slow, vibey song with emotional tone, paired with a stiff, exaggerated meme character trying to perform a smooth, expressive TikTok dance. It creates that signature mix of cool + awkward + chaotic energy that keeps people watching and replaying. Use this CapCut template as a green screen dance reaction over clips where someone is feeling themselves, trying to be smooth, or turning a moment into a vibe but it’s slightly off in a funny way. It works perfectly for meme edits, reaction videos, and trend posts where the dance becomes the punchline. This CapCut template has @chickennoodle266’s animation of Tung Tung Tung Sahur dancing to the viral Chinese singing lady sound while copying the smooth moves of @calebrownn, blending multiple TikTok trends into one chaotic, loopable edit. The Chinese singing audio—often recognized by the lyric “房子大了电话小了感觉越来越好”—has gone viral for its catchy melody, nostalgic tone, and ironic “life is getting better” vibe, making it a popular choice for edits and remixes across the platform  What makes this version hit is the combination—Tung Tung Tung Sahur’s stiff, exaggerated movement trying to match @calebrownn’s smooth, confident dance creates a perfect contrast. It mixes brainrot chaos with clean choreography, turning it into a scroll-stopping moment that feels both random and oddly satisfying. Use this CapCut template as a green screen dance reaction over clips where something is improving, someone is feeling confident, or a moment turns into a full vibe. It works perfectly for meme edits, reaction videos, and trend posts where the Sahur dance becomes the punchline. 0h → 4.5h   If you know, you know👀   I’d mainly recommend this for:   – dehydrated skin (not oily — actually lacking water)   – skin that feels tight or looks dull   – compromised skin barrier   – when your skin just needs a long, low-effort hydration boost   It’s less about instant results and more about slowly restoring moisture and improving overall skin texture💆🏻‍♀️✨ #skincare #skincareroutine #biodance_collagen_mask #biodance #mask

This is my mom’s morning skincare routine at 67 years old (1 of 2). Not sponsored, just her  routine explained in more detail. This routine is used on days she’s doing an “everything shower”, on days she washes her hair which is about every other day (3x a week). She has very dry skin. On these days, she does the following:  PREP: Cleanser (@Vanicream™ Sensitive Skin Care) Warm Towel Compress (to prep for face mask, 3x a week)  Optional: Microwave warm towel compress after initial compress and compress again DIY mask (Greek yogurt + raw honey mask; 3x a week), rinsed with just water Ice Water Splash (or cold towel compress; daily) Optional: Sheet mask for 10 to 20 minutes after DIY mask. (She uses sheet masks sparingly on days her skin needs extra TLC; @Dr.Althea US  SKINCARE PRODUCTS (exact product varies by day depending on skin condition): Toner (if applying just DIY mask, no sheet mask) Serum (if applying just DIY mask, no sheet mask) Vitamin C (Goodal Vita C) Moisturizer cream (@epii_global) SPF 50+ (@anua_global) #koreanskincare #aginggracefully #matureskin #dryskin #skincareroutine

Прыщи на спине (акне на туловище или «бакне») возникают из-за гиперактивности сальных желез и закупорки пор, что создает среду для размножения бактерий.  lemarkel.ru lemarkel.ru  +1 Основные причины появления Гормональные изменения: Повышенный уровень тестостерона стимулирует выработку кожного сала. Внешние факторы: Трение от рюкзаков, тесная синтетическая одежда и скопление пота после тренировок. Неправильный уход: Использование комедогенных (забивающих поры) средств для тела или недостаточное очищение кожи. Климат: Высокая температура и влажность часто обостряют проблему в летний период. #jjjianty #foruyou #fupシ #щп #прыщи

#92i #makeup Le “92i makeup” fait référence à un style de maquillage inspiré de l’univers du rap français, surtout lié à Booba et à son label 92i (“92 International”, en référence au département des Hauts-de-Seine). Sur les réseaux sociaux, ce terme désigne un maquillage au style urbain et confiant : teint très net, contouring marqué, regard intense avec eyeliner ou faux cils, lèvres bien dessinées et une attitude sûre de soi. Ce n’est pas une technique officielle de maquillage, mais plutôt une esthétique inspirée du luxe, de la street culture et d’une image forte et assumée.

No ad!! ✨Anua RATING by Korean pharmacist 🇰🇷 1️⃣ Heartleaf Pore Control Cleansing Oil ✔️2/10 fragrance is a bit much.  risky for acne-prone skin. 2️⃣Heartleaf Quercetinol Pore Deep Cleansing Foam ✔️8/10 the BHA in this is great for acne anf clogged pores 3️⃣Heartleaf 77% Soothing Toner ✔️6/10 super easy But there’s many alternatives in the market 4️⃣Niacinamide 10 + TXA 4 Serum ✔️3/10 too aggressive for my sensitive skin ,Broke me out😭 5️⃣Azelaic Acid 10 Hyaluron Redness Soothing Serum ✔️10/10 Azelaic acid for redness and bumps, hyaluronic acid to buffer it. Very smart. 6️⃣PDRN Collagen Melting Patch For Glass Skin ✔️2/10 Cute, but no.
